messages.text: Customer Acme reporting CSV import truncates rows past 50,000. We're seeing this for the third time this month.
Yep, same as the issue Foo Corp raised on 2026-01-19 and Bar Industries on 2026-01-26. Looks like a recurring CSV import row-cap problem.
Yet another CSV import truncation report (this is the fourth in 6 weeks). Filed bug ENG-1421 to track the row cap.
SSO outage with Okta from 09:42–10:11 UTC. Root cause: expired SAML cert; rotation runbook lives in the security handbook.
Quick reminder for new responders: SSO certs rotate every 6 months and the next rotation is due 2026-08-15.
